rulings.Case Title: DANA E. MALLOY VS. DAVID GOLDFEIN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 1, 2020 line 5. CROSS DEFENDANT DANA E. MALLOY, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE AND DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. All issues raised by the Cross-Complaint belong in Probate Department as is ostensibly admitted by the filing of the probate petition and in opposition. Request to remove the partition action to probate court in opposition to the demurrer is not properly before the Court and no authority is cited for the proposition that a partition action could be brought in Probate Department. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JACKSON TOWER ASSOCIATES, L.P. VS. HANAKO KAWAGUCHI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 1, 2020 line 6. DEFENDANT HANA KAWAGUCHI DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, complaint sufficiently states facts to withstand a demurrer. The Court notes that contrary to Plaintiff's claim that this action is solely/primarily based on breach of contract, it is not. Plaintiff expressly seeks a determination whether defendant permanently resides at the premises, a determination to be made by the Rent Board. However, other relief sought may not be addressed at the Rent Board, and therefore, this case is properly before this Court as a whole. Furthermore, any determinations as to the legality of the lease provisions and whether violations of those provisions constitute breach of contract, is an issue of fact to be determined later in the litigation. =(501/CFH)
